hero.title: Holistic educational
hero.subtitle: We support children, families, educators and communities through an integrated approach that combines Montessori pedagogy, art, nature and human development.

about.title: Conscious and integrated education
about.description: Montessori All Around is an educational project that combines Montessori pedagogy, art, nature and human development to support children, families, educators and communities.

vision.title: Vision
vision.description: To contribute to a more conscious educational culture, where children and adults grow in respectful and inspiring environments.

mission.title: Mission
mission.description: To support the integral development of the child and guide adults in their role as childhood guides.

nature.title: Nature
nature.description: Programs that connect children and families with the natural world, promoting outdoor experiences.

art.title: Art
art.description: Photography, painting and sculpture as an essential part of human and educational development.

about.quote: Education is a natural process that develops spontaneously in the human being.

educator.name: Roberta Carreira
educator.title: International Montessori Educator and Pedagogical Leader

profile.title: Professional Profile
profile.bio1: I am an international Montessori educator with over 20 years of experience in early childhood education, having worked in Portugal, China, Italy and the United States.
profile.bio2: My journey includes leading and developing high-quality Montessori environments for children from 6 months to 7 years old, always with a strong focus on autonomy, emotional development, creativity and educational excellence.
profile.bio3: I combine Montessori pedagogy with my training in Fine Arts, Children's Yoga and a deep connection with nature, creating truly holistic educational experiences.

certifications.title: Training and Certifications
items: American Montessori Society Certification (AMS/MACTE) - Seton Montessori Institute, Chicago
Children's Yoga & Mindfulness Teacher - Yoga Maya Kids International
Bachelor's Degree in Fine Arts - Painting, cum laude - Perugia, Italy
Emergency First Aid at Work - Valid until 2028

expertise.title: Expertise
items: Montessori Education (Infants, Toddlers and Early Childhood)
Early Childhood Education and Pedagogical Leadership
Integration of Art, Yoga and Movement

international.title: International Experience
international.description: Including leading schools such as Montessori School of Shanghai, The Little Oaks Montessori, Boundless Life and Nido Montessori Lisbon.

methodology.title: The Four Pillars
methodology.description: Our integrated approach unites four fundamental elements to create transformative educational experiences that respect the developing human being.

montessori.title: Montessori Pedagogy
montessori.description: Child-centered educational approach, respecting their natural rhythm of development and autonomy.

art.title: Art & Culture
art.description: Photography, painting and sculpture integrated into the educational process as expression of human development.

nature.title: Nature
nature.description: Outdoor experiences that connect children and families with the natural world in Lisbon and Sintra.

community.title: Community
community.description: Building an educational network that unites families, educators and schools around common values.

methodology.quote: The child is not a vase to be filled, but a fountain to be released.

services.title: How We Can Help
services.description: We offer a variety of services to support children, families, educators and communities on the Montessori path.

familyConsulting.title: Family Consulting
familyConsulting.description: Personalized guidance for parents and caregivers who wish to implement the Montessori approach at home.

babysitting.title: Educational Babysitting
babysitting.description: Childcare based on Montessori principles, respecting each child's rhythm and needs.

yoga.title: Children's Yoga
yoga.description: Yoga sessions adapted for children, promoting physical and emotional well-being and concentration.

nature.title: Nature Programs
nature.description: Outdoor educational experiences that connect children and families with the natural world.

cultural.title: Cultural Experiences
cultural.description: Programs that integrate art, music and culture into children's educational development.

schoolConsulting.title: School Consulting
schoolConsulting.description: Support in creating and developing Montessori schools, from conception to implementation.

testimonials.title: What Families Say
testimonials.description: Real stories from families who chose the Montessori path for their children.

items.name: Ana Silva
items.content: Pedro's transformation was incredible. He became more independent, confident and curious. The school environment is welcoming and the team is extraordinary.

items.name: Ricardo Santos
items.content: The parent consulting completely changed the dynamics of our home. We learned to respect Maria's time and create an environment that stimulates her autonomy.

items.name: Carla Ferreira
items.content: The Montessori training course was eye-opening. The practical component is excellent and the trainer conveys not only knowledge but also passion for education.

items.name: Miguel Costa
items.content: Choosing this school was the best decision we made. Tomás loves going to school and has developed skills we never imagined for his age.

contact.title: Let's Talk
contact.description: Have questions about our services or want to learn more about the Montessori approach? Get in touch with us.

form.name: Name

form.success: Message sent successfully! We will get in touch shortly.

community.title: Educators & Community
community.description: We conduct Montessori introduction sessions, professional meetings and work on developing an educational network in Portugal.

social.hint: Follow us on social media for news, Montessori education tips and information about our programs.

footer.description: Holistic educational project that combines Montessori pedagogy, art, nature and human development.
